description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:5.6 Docker image and a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, installs git, wget, and phpunit with apt-get, downloads https://raw.github.com/splitbrain/dokuwiki-travis/master/travis.sh via wget, and executes it with sh travis.sh. Define a variable DOKUWIKI set to stable. Add a runtest job in the default test stage that executes the script commands: cd _test && phpunit --stderr --group plugin_userprofile. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules and runs on every commit.
